Step 1 of 4
Company basics
§ Step 1 of 4 · Company basics

Tell us about your company.

5-minute application. We'll manually review within 48-72 hours and WhatsApp you the result.

Required
Trading/brand name customers will see
Required
Valid 10-digit phone required
Valid email required
Optional but helps review. Include if available.
Required
§ Step 2 of 4 · Approvals & experience

Show us your credentials.

We onboard only MNRE-empanelled + UPNEDA-approved installers. These are non-negotiable. Have approval numbers ready.

From mnre.gov.in empanellment list. We'll verify.
MNRE empanellment is mandatory
From upneda.org.in. Required for state subsidy disbursal.
UPNEDA approval is mandatory
Valid 15-char GSTIN required
Valid 10-char PAN required
Minimum 25 required. We'll verify via UPNEDA service records.
Resellers without in-house crews are not eligible.
§ Step 3 of 4 · Coverage & capacity

Which districts can you service?

Select all UP districts where you can do site visits within 48 hours of lead assignment. We route leads only to vendors serving that district.

Select all that apply. You can update later.
Loading districts...
Select at least one district
Smaller leads will be routed to vendors with lower minimums.
Honest capacity helps us not overload you. You can adjust later.
§ Step 4 of 4 · Commitments

Final commitments.

By submitting, you agree to the following. Detailed vendor agreement will be sent for signature if you're accepted.

📋

Application received!

Our team will review your MNRE + UPNEDA status, install history, and capacity. Decision within 48-72 hours via WhatsApp.

What we'll verify

Application ID: —
MNRE empanellment status (current/valid)
UPNEDA approved vendor status (current/valid)
UPNEDA service records (install volume in last 24 months)
GST + PAN verification
Customer complaint history (NCDRC + UPNEDA helpdesk)
01
Within 48-72 hours:

You'll receive a WhatsApp message from our team with the application decision. Approved vendors get a vendor agreement to e-sign.

02
If approved — onboarding call:

30-minute call to walk through lead routing, commission tracking, and dispute resolution. Add you to vendor network WhatsApp.

03
Leads start flowing:

HOT/WARM leads in your selected districts route to you within 4 hours of customer submission. Start closing deals immediately.

Questions while waiting? WhatsApp +91 98765 43210 or email vendors@solarsubsidies.com
